channel.title: Bloomberg Markets
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 BLOOMBERG L.P. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

item.title: Oil Traders Crowd Around Cheap TACO Hedge as Iran War Escalates
item.description: An unusual options trade is becoming a favored hedge against the risks of sudden U-turns in US President Donald Trump’s stance on Iran, a dynamic that has repeatedly whipsawed markets in recent months.
item.dc:creator: Mia Gindis, Alex Longley and David Marino

item.title: Citi Traders Pitch Shorting French Shipping Giant CMA CGM Bonds
item.description: Citigroup’s credit traders and analysts are recommending their hedge fund clients short bonds issued by French shipping giant CMA CGM Group, according to people familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Edward Clark

item.title: Chevron to Sign Oil Investment Accords With Iraq on Friday
item.description: Chevron Corp. expects to sign accords with Iraq on Friday that will advance its negotiations about investing in large oil fields, according to a senior company executive.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Crowley

item.title: Ladbrokes Owner Entain to Cut 2% of Staff as UK Taxes Hit
item.description: Entain Plc will cut 500 jobs, or about 2% of its global workforce, as the gambling industry grapples with higher UK taxes, tighter regulation and growing competition from prediction markets.
item.dc:creator: Louise Moon
